message: Closed Union alternatives must be proven pairwise disjoint; this pair overlaps or its relation is unknown.
fixit_hint: make the alternatives provably disjoint or use one common type
fixit_policy: never select a source-order or runtime winner
notes: Current finite relation diagnostic; product execution remains NOT_RUN.

message: A typed pattern over a closed Union must name exactly one declared alternative identity.
fixit_hint: name one exact alternative or use an explicit structural pattern
fixit_policy: never infer a subtype test or open RTTI
notes: Current closed-Union pattern admission diagnostic; product execution remains NOT_RUN.

message: The Enum pattern case must belong to the subject Enum and its active payload arity, labels, positions, and child types must match exactly.
fixit_hint: select a case from the subject Enum and match only its declared active payload
fixit_policy: never reinterpret a foreign case, project inactive payload storage, or run the guard before this check
notes: Current Enum-pattern admission diagnostic; product execution remains NOT_RUN.

message: Deeplus has no null value; use ::none in an expected Option context or Option<T>::none explicitly.
fixit_hint: replace null with ::none when the expected type is Option<T>
fixit_policy: apply only when the expected Option type is exact; never infer a nullable type or hidden conversion
notes: Current reserved-recovery diagnostic contract; parser/checker execution remains NOT_RUN.

message: Custom operator declarations are not current Deeplus; use a named Trait method or function.
fixit_hint: name the operation as a Trait requirement, method, message, or function
fixit_policy: do not invent a glyph mapping or activate Preview-design operator dispatch
notes: Current closed-vocabulary rejection; product execution remains NOT_RUN.

message: A Trait conformance, extension, or witness cannot activate a fixed operator glyph in the current profile.
fixit_hint: call the named Trait method or API explicitly
fixit_policy: do not synthesize operator evidence, provider lookup, specialization, or fallback
notes: TCC-P1-002..008 remain OPEN; fixed-operator conformance overloading remains nonactivatable.

message: This range spelling is not current Deeplus; use .. or ..< in an admitted range owner.
fixit_hint: use an inclusive .. or explicit-exclusive ..< range and a named step/reverse API when required
fixit_policy: never reinterpret ... outside its structural owner or infer descending semantics for ..>
notes: Reserved-recovery ownership for infix ... and ..>; parser execution remains NOT_RUN.

message: An index suffix requires a scalar index, a bounded slice range whose bounds may use ^ or $, or an admitted NumericArray * axis.
fixit_hint: use the receiver's declared first coordinate or key; use [*] only for an admitted NumericArray full axis
fixit_policy: do not infer a default index, hidden copy, or implicit full-axis selection
notes: Current nonempty IndexSuffix contract; parser execution remains NOT_RUN.
